response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the JSON lyrics for the chorus sections. 2. The provided JSON is highly repetitive and lacks the lyrics for the verse and bridge sections present in the video (00:27-01:11); I relied on on-screen lyrics and audio to accurately transcribe these. 3. Confirmed all text matches the full audio duration, following vocal bursts strictly. 4. Included transcription and translation for the relevant promotional on-screen text in the final scene.

subtitles.original: ありがとう書くとしたら
subtitles.english: If I were to write "thank you,"

subtitles.original: 毎日になっちゃうくらい
subtitles.english: It would be enough for every single day.

subtitles.original: 重すぎる私の想いは
最後に伝えるね
subtitles.english: So I'll tell you at the very end.

subtitles.original: 君がいる それだけでさ
理由になるなんて奇跡
subtitles.english: It's a miracle that it's reason enough.

subtitles.original: ありがとう 足りないな
ごまかすよ
subtitles.english: So I'll just brush it off.

subtitles.original: 愛してる
魔法石のブレスレット
シロツメクサの女王様
プラスチックだらけの宝石箱でずっと
subtitles.english: In a jewelry box full of plastic,

subtitles.original: 遊べるよ君と
subtitles.english: I can play with you forever.

subtitles.original: 思い出の欠片たち
溢れるこの場所で
subtitles.english: In this place where they overflow.

subtitles.original: 私の言葉 君の言葉 重ねて
笑っていたい
忘れられる 世界で今
subtitles.english: In this world where things are forgotten,

subtitles.original: 私が選んだ生き方
subtitles.english: This is the way of life I've chosen.

subtitles.original: 手紙をさ 書いたから
この音に乗せて
subtitles.english: I'll put it in this song.

subtitles.original: ありがとう書くとしたら
subtitles.english: If I were to write "thank you,"

subtitles.english: It would be enough for every single day.

最後に伝えるね
subtitles.english: So I'll tell you at the very end.

理由になるなんて奇跡
subtitles.english: It's a miracle that it's reason enough.

subtitles.original: ありがとう 足りないな
ごまかすよ
subtitles.english: So I'll just brush it off.

ありがとうございましたー！
